arts.ttl: Argentina vs Brazil: Prediction, kick-off time, TV, live stream, team news, h2h results, odds
arts.sum: Arch-rivals clash in a massive World Cup qualifier in Buenos Aires on Tuesday night

arts.ttl: Brazil predicts end to winless run in Argentina in World Cup qualifier
arts.sum: That didn’t put off Brazil striker Raphinha, who kicked off the hostilities on Monday by promising to score against the World Cup holder in Buenos Aires on Tuesday in a 2026 qualifier. Argentina, leading South America, can clinch a World Cup berth by drawing with third-placed Brazil with four rounds to spare.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit as Brazil starlet fears missing out on World Cup after season of sitting behind Kylian Mbappe in pecking order
arts.sum: Endrick has opened the door for potential suitors by hinting he is keen to leave Real Madrid to ensure he makes Brazil's 2026 World Cup squad. The forward is yet to start a La Liga match.

arts.ttl: Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper
arts.sum: Manchester United have ramped up their efforts to sign Burnley goalkeeper James Trafford, making him a key target for the upcoming summer transfer window. The Red Devils are actively pursuing reinforcements between the sticks, and Trafford has emerged as a serious contender to challenge Andre Onana for the No.1 spot next season. The 22-year-old has […] The post Report: Andre Onana’s future on ropes as Man United enquire for young new goalkeeper appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Brazil's Dorival, Ancelotti discuss Endrick progress
arts.sum: Brazil coach Dorival Júnior has revealed he has had a long talk with Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti regarding Endrick's progress.

arts.ttl: Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit to keep World Cup dream alive
arts.sum: Endrick has hinted he could look to leave Real Madrid as the forward looks to keep his World Cup dream alive. The teenager signed for Real Madrid from Palmeiras in a €60m deal last summer but has struggled for first-team football. He has scored six goals in 28 appearances across all competitions, but is yet […] The post Endrick hints at Real Madrid exit to keep World Cup dream alive first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Raphinha delivers fiery x-rated two-word message to Argentina - as Brazil star makes vow in absence of rival Lionel Messi
arts.sum: The Barcelona man is in contention for the Ballon d'Or amid a breathtaking season which has seen him score 27 goals and set up a further 20.

arts.ttl: Raphinha adds spice to the Argentina-Brazil clash with menacing claim
arts.sum: Speaking on RomárioTV, the Barça winger claimed that he is adamant that he will score a goal in the Superclásico. “Beat them like crazy!

arts.ttl: Argentina v Brazil - The most valuable XI ever for players from both South American nations
arts.sum: As the March international break gets underway, the long and winding road to the 2026 World Cup begins. Qualifiers will take place this spring, with teams across the globe vying to make it to USA,...

arts.ttl: Argentina vs. Brazil: Head-to-head record and past meetings ahead of 2026 World Cup qualifying clash
arts.sum: Ahead of Wednesday's World Cup Qualifying - South America clash between Argentina and Brazil, Sports Mole looks at the head-to-head record and previous meetings between the two clubs.
